Program_Description: The Black Infant Health (BIH) Program is dedicated to empowering Black/African American women by providing free services that promote healthy pregnancies and strong babies.
Target_Population: Black/African American women who are 16 years or older, pregnant or up to six months postpartum.
Eligibility_Requirements: Open to all income levels—services are free!
Application_Process: If you would like to refer yourself or another person to BIH, please call (661) 321-3000 or submit a referral form by fax to (661) 868-1291 or by e-mail to bih@kerncounty.com.
